@startuml
actor Actor
participant "Dashboard" as Dashboard <<Boundary>> {
  participant Table <<Control>> 
}
control IssuesDetailController
boundary Details <<Boundary>> 

package Services{
    control createIssuesStatistics<<Service>> #DDDDDD
    service findPrimarykey(origin, reference) <<Entity Service>>#BBBBBB
    
   package Repositories{    
        entity selectAllissues() <<Repository>> #CCCCCC  
        
         loop   
            new Issue1 as issue2
            
             activate issue2
                note right of issue2 :new / redirect
                
                 deactivate issue2
        
          endloop
      
      } 
    
     'entity findByid(id)<<repository>> #CCCCC
     
     
       par
           getCategories(origin,reference)->createDistributionByCategory(origin,reference):findByPrimaryKey(origin,reference);select(origin,reference);findByld(origin,reference)
           
              return issues;return issues ;return issues;return issuesPropertyDistrubution
              
               group Loop
                   findById(Id)<-Issue3:new<-issue4
                    
                    activate issue4
                        
                        note left of issue4:New/redirect
                        
                     deactivate issue4
                     
                  endgroup
                  
                   
               
                 
                
            
             
       
         
          
      
endpar


'note over Entityservice::findAll():Set<Issues>



@enduml
